title: Racosperma pinguifolium
taxonomy: Racosperma pinguifolium is a species within the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to Australia and belongs to the genus Racosperma, which is commonly associated with Acacia. The classification of Racosperma pinguifolium places it as Racosperma pinguifolium (Cunn. ex Benth.) Pedley. The species is also recognized as Acacia pinguifolia in some classification systems. Further research may be necessary to clarify the exact classification status of Racosperma pinguifolium.
